ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_label" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code to which the county belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "sex_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender category */,
  "sex_label" TEXT /* Label for the gender category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the gender category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census data entry */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "sex_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender category */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "ethnicity_code" TEXT /* Reference to the ethnicity code */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket (e.g., 0-10k, 10k-50k, 50k+) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Population count for the county and gender */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the census data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_county_code FOREIGN KEY ("county_code") REFERENCES counties ("county_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_sex_code FOREIGN KEY ("sex_code") REFERENCES genders ("sex_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is public or private */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census data being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed log of changes made in the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_census_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted by the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission applies to (e.g., census_data, reports) */,
  "is_system_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is a system-level permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)
